tour_search_desc: Enter keywords to quickly filter data in the list.
tour_add_desc: Click here to open the form for adding new data to the system.
tour_help_desc: If you need assistance, click this Help button to view the guide again.
tour_edit_desc: Update existing information for this record.
tour_delete_desc: Remove this record from the system. This action is usually irreversible.
tour_export_desc: Download the entire data list as an Excel (.xlsx) file.
tour_grid_desc: The main area where detailed records are displayed, with support for sorting and pagination.
tour_user_field_username_desc: The name used to log into the system. Note: Cannot be changed after creation.
tour_user_field_password_desc: Set a strong password to protect the account.
tour_user_field_roles_desc: Select one or more roles to grant permissions to this user.
tour_user_field_fullname_desc: Display name used across notifications and system documents.
tour_user_field_email_desc: Used for communication and password recovery. Email must be unique.
tour_user_field_phone_desc: Primary contact info for the user.
tour_user_field_dob_desc: Keep track of birthdates for HR policies or celebrations.
tour_user_field_status_desc: Enable or suspend this user's access to the system.
tour_tenant_field_name_desc: The identification name of the tenant (e.g., ABC Company).
tour_tenant_field_code_desc: A unique code used to distinguish tenants in the system.
tour_tenant_field_conn_desc: Configure the path to the customer's private database.
tour_tenant_field_features_desc: Set the functional modules that this tenant is allowed to use.
tour_role_field_name_desc: The name of the permission group (e.g., Accountant, Warehouse Manager).
tour_role_field_desc_desc: A brief note about the function of this role.
tour_role_field_perms_desc: Set detailed specific permissions for this role.
tour_role_field_status_desc: Enable or disable the usage of this role throughout the system.
tour_tenant_search_desc: Filter the list of tenants by name or identifier.
tour_tenant_add_desc: Click here to register a new tenant in the system.
tour_tenant_grid_desc: Displays configuration and features for each tenant.
tour_role_search_desc: Quickly filter group permissions based on name or description.
tour_role_add_desc: Define a new group permission corresponding to system functions.
tour_role_grid_desc: Review existing roles and their active status.
tour_tenant_field_db_desc: Select the database management system corresponding to your connection string.
tour_tenant_btn_check_conn_desc: Click this button to immediately let the system verify if your connection string is valid and accessible.
tour_popup_cancel_desc: Close the popup without saving any changes. If you've modified data, the system will ask for confirmation.
tour_popup_save_desc: Commit your changes to the system. The button will show a loading spinner while the request is being processed.
